reason: Measured per-cluster L1 tile/reducer and FIFO/router costs do not overturn the current clustered Llama7B frontier; the best sampled point remains nm64_flat with the smallest local L1 profile, so the next risk is full value-datapath and NoC/SRAM closure rather than this local-cost proxy.
next_action: Plan and run the next closure step for the full softmax-weighted value datapath and then refine NoC/SRAM cluster-memory scheduling.
